notes: 2U rack-mount, 4-channel Class-D touring amplifier. 1600W/ch @ 8Ω, 3000W/ch @ 4Ω. USB-A firmware update port on front panel IS confirmed in the official manual (page 24, Software Update section) — the prior reviewer's claim that USB is absent from the manual was incorrect; the manual explicitly states 'insert the USB key into the USB port in the front panel.' AC mains connector part number corrected to PC 5/5-STF1-7,62 per manual pages 20–21. Optional 16-in/8-out Dante card available (not included by default). WiFi built in for wireless monitoring via web app and ArmoníaPlus software.

ports.name: Analog Input CH1
ports.note: Neutrik XLR female, balanced analog, Pin 2 hot

ports.name: Analog Input CH2
ports.note: Neutrik XLR female, balanced analog, Pin 2 hot

ports.name: Analog Input CH3
ports.note: Neutrik XLR female, balanced analog, Pin 2 hot

ports.name: Analog Input CH4
ports.note: Neutrik XLR female, balanced analog, Pin 2 hot

ports.name: AES3 Input CH1/CH2
ports.note: Neutrik XLR female, AES3 110Ω, carries two AES3 channels (CH1+CH2)

ports.name: AES3 Input CH3/CH4
ports.note: Neutrik XLR female, AES3 110Ω, carries two AES3 channels (CH3+CH4)

ports.name: Speaker Output CH1/CH2
ports.note: Neutrik NL4MD speakON, one connector per channel pair; supports single-ended and bridge-tied loads

ports.name: Speaker Output CH3/CH4
ports.note: Neutrik NL4MD speakON, one connector per channel pair; supports single-ended and bridge-tied loads

ports.name: Network ETH1 (Primary)
ports.note: Neutrik etherCON, primary network port; 100 Mbit/s (IEEE 802.3u) and 1 Gbit/s (IEEE 802.3ab)

ports.name: Remote ON/OFF
ports.note: Phoenix euroblock connector for remote power control

ports.name: AC Mains Input
ports.note: Phoenix PC 5/5-STF1-7,62 flying connector; accepts single-phase (100–240 V), bi-phase, or three-phase (200–415 V) 50/60 Hz

ports.name: USB (Firmware Update)
ports.note: Front-panel USB-A port for firmware updates via USB key (confirmed in manual page 24, section 13: Software Update)
